entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Multi-purpose crops serving as key sources of energy, protein, vitamins, and minerals in dryland tropics

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Major crops that form the basis of diets in the developing world

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A serious health threat caused by diets lacking diversity and micronutrients

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A geographic region where millets are key sources of nutrition

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A geographic region where millets are key sources of nutrition

entities.name: DRYLAND TROPICS
entities.description: A geographic region characterized by dry conditions where millets are grown

entities.name: DROUGHT-PRONE AREAS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by lack of water where millets are key sources of nutrition

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: The ability of millets to withstand non-biological environmental stresses

entities.name: ADAPTATION TO DIVERSE AGRO-ECOLOGIES
entities.description: The ability of millets to grow in various agricultural environments

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY IN NUTRIENT-POOR SOILS
entities.description: The capacity of millets to maintain high yields in soils with low nutrient levels

entities.name: GRAIN MICRONUTRIENT DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of essential micronutrients within the grain of a crop

entities.name: GENETIC AND GENOMIC INNOVATIONS
entities.description: Recent scientific advancements used to enhance the nutritional value of crops

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: A method used to accurately and rapidly measure grain micronutrient content

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA in an organism, used to enhance nutritional content

entities.name: PROTEOMICS
entities.description: The large-scale study of proteins, used to enhance nutritional content

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The study of small-molecule metabolites, used to enhance nutritional content

entities.name: PHENOMICS
entities.description: The study of physical and biochemical traits, used to enhance nutritional content

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A set of technologies that allow for precise changes to the DNA of an organism

entities.name: INTEGRATED OMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: The combination of genomics, proteomics, metabolomics, and phenomics

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of crops through genetic or genomic interventions

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: CHANGING CLIMATE
entities.description: The ongoing shift in global weather patterns affecting agriculture
